text:
```yaml infra-staging-egreen/workspace/ftp.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-config
data:
  SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__DEBUG: "true"
  SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__PORT: "2121"
  SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__TLS_MODE: "0"
  # SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__CERTIFICATE_FILE: "/srv/sftpgo/certs/tls.crt"
  # SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__CERTIFICATE_KEY_FILE: "/srv/sftpgo/certs/tls.key"
  SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__PASSIVE_HOST: "ftp.k8-test.egreen.fr"
  SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__PASSIVE_CONNECTIONS_SECURITY: "0"
  # SFTPGO_FTPD__PASSIVE_PORT_RANGE__START: "30000"
  # SFTPGO_FTPD__PASSIVE_PORT_RANGE__END: "30005"
  SFTPGO_FTPD__PASSIVE_PORT_RANGE__START: "40000"
  SFTPGO_FTPD__PASSIVE_PORT_RANGE__END: "40001"
  SFTPGO_FTPD__DISABLE_ACTIVE_MODE: "true"
  # SFTPGO_FTPD__APPLY_PROXY_CONFIG: "true"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__DRIVER: "postgresql"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__NAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__HOST: "db-sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__USERNAME: "sftpgo"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: "sftpgociw8sWECsfgdd29fH2nwhkB"
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__POOL_SIZE: "10"
  SFTPGO_HTTPD__BRANDING__NAME: "eGreen FTP server"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-secret
type: Opaque
data:
  SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD: c2Z0cGdvY2l3OHNXRUNzZmdkZDI5Zkgybndoa0I= # Base64-encoded value
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-sa
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-role
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["services"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-rolebinding
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: sftpgo-sa
    namespace: egreen
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: sftpgo-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-svc
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 21
      targetPort: 2121
      protocol: TCP
      name: ftp
    # - port: 30000
    #   targetPort: 30000
    #   protocol: TCP
    #   name: ftp-passive0
    # - port: 30001
    #   targetPort: 30001
    #   protocol: TCP
    #   name: ftp-passive1
    # - port: 30002
    #   targetPort: 30002
    #   protocol: TCP
    #   name: ftp-passive2
    # - port: 30003
    #   targetPort: 30003
    #   protocol: TCP
    #   name: ftp-passive3
    # - port: 30004
    #   targetPort: 30004
    #   protocol: TCP
    #   name: ftp-passive4
    # - port: 30005
    #   targetPort: 30005
    #   protocol: TCP
    #   name: ftp-passive5
    - port: 21000
      targetPort: 21000
      name: psv1
    - port: 21001
      targetPort: 21001
      name: psv2
  selector:
    app: sftpgo
---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: sftpgo
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: sftpgo
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: sftpgo
    spec:
      # //!\ Important remove onece debugged
      securityContext:
        runAsUser: 0
      serviceAccountName: sftpgo-sa
      initContainers:
        - name: init-permissions
          image: busybox
          command: ["sh", "-c", "chown -R 1000:1000 /srv/sftpgo/data"]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: sftpgo-data-volume
              mountPath: /srv/sftpgo/data
              subPath: sftpgo-data
        # - name: set-passive-ip
        #   image: bitnami/kubectl:latest
        #   command:
        #     - /bin/sh
        #     - -c
        #     - |
        #       export LB_IP=$(kubectl get svc sftpgo -o jsonpath='{.status.loadBalancer.ingress[0].ip}')
        #       echo "SFTPGO_FTPD__BINDINGS__0__FORCE_PASSIVE_IP=$LB_IP" > /var/lib/sftpgo/env.d/passive-ip.env
        #   volumeMounts:
        #     - name: config-volume
        #       mountPath: /var/lib/sftpgo/env.d
      containers:
        - name: sftpgo
          image: drakkan/sftpgo:2.6.x
          ports:
            - containerPort: 2121
            # - containerPort: 30000
            # - containerPort: 30001
            # - containerPort: 30002
            # - containerPort: 30003
            # - containerPort: 30004
            # - containerPort: 30005
            - containerPort: 21000
            - containerPort: 21001
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: web-ui
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: sftpgo-config
            - secretRef:
                name: sftpgo-secret
          volumeMounts:
            - name: sftpgo-data-volume
              mountPath: /srv/sftpgo/data
              subPath: sftpgo-data
            - name: config-volume
              mountPath: /var/lib/sftpgo/env.d
            - name: certs-volume
              mountPath: /srv/sftpgo/certs
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: certs-volume
          secret:
            secretName: sftpgo-web-ui-tls
        - name: config-volume
          emptyDir: {}
        - name: sftpgo-data-volume
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: sftpgo-data-pvc

---
# Important to let the volume claim outside of the deployment to prevent delete it in the case of deployment deletion
# As it will store the ftp data we need to keep it
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-data-pvc
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 1Gi
  storageClassName: sbs-default-retain
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: db-sftpgo
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: db-sftpgo
  serviceName: "db-sftpgo"
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: db-sftpgo
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: postgres-sftpgo
          image: postgres:16
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: sftpgo
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: sftpgo-secret
                  key: SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__PASSWORD
          volumeMounts:
            - name: postgres-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
              subPath: postgres-data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: postgres-data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: db-sftpgo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: db-sftpgo
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-web-ui
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
      name: web-ui
  selector:
    app: sftpgo
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-web-ui
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - web
  routes:
    - match: Host(`ftp.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      middlewares:
        - name: redirect-https
      services:
        - name: sftpgo-web-ui
          port: 8080
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: sftpgo-web-ui-tls
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - websecure
  routes:
    - match: Host(`ftp-ui.k8-test.egreen.fr`)
      kind: Rule
      services:
        - name: sftpgo-web-ui
          port: 8080
  tls:
    secretName: sftpgo-web-ui-tls

---
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
  name: ftp-ui.k8-test.egreen.fr
spec:
  dnsNames:
    - ftp-ui.k8-test.egreen.fr
    - ftp.k8-test.egreen.fr
  secretName: sftpgo-web-ui-tls
  issuerRef:
    name: letsencrypt-prod # Use the issuer created previously
    kind: ClusterIssuer
```

Create ingressroutetcp for ftp and passive ports
To create an `IngressRouteTCP` for FTP and passive ports, you need to define the TCP routing rules for Traefik. Below is an example configuration for the `IngressRouteTCP` objects that will route traffic for the FTP service and its passive ports.

### Updated YAML with `IngressRouteTCP` for FTP and Passive Ports

```yaml
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRouteTCP
metadata:
  name: ftp
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - ftp
  routes:
    - match: HostSNI(`*`) # Match all incoming traffic
      services:
        - name: sftpgo-svc
          port: 21
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRouteTCP
metadata:
  name: ftp-passive-ports
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - ftp-passive
  routes:
    - match: HostSNI(`*`) # Match all incoming traffic
      services:
        - name: sftpgo-svc
          port: 21000
    - match: HostSNI(`*`) # Match all incoming traffic
      services:
        - name: sftpgo-svc
          port: 21001
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: TCPRouter
metadata:
  name: ftp-router
  namespace: egreen
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - ftp
  service: sftpgo-svc
  rule: "HostSNI(`*`)"
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: TCPRouter
metadata:
  name: ftppassive router
